raw_consumer_statement:
I called earlier today on XX/XX/XXXX, about my credit card XXXX that was opened in XXXX I never recieved a card then and only noticed this account was opened when I received a bill to pay I tried to call then. I was referred by the online chat to call the customer service line. I called the customer service line and the call was picked up and told they could not help me and to call back in 1-2 hours. I told the online customer service support this and they told me that I should call back again. Ultimately, I asked to speak to someone who could better assist me and was referred back to the number that is not working. 

At the end, I was defeated after having paid a previous fee that I never spent and struggled to close this account for several months.
